findings.summary: Settings dialog uses vertical Tabs with 4 categories: General, Shortcuts, Providers, Models. No search/filter.
Management dialogs use `List` component with search, groupBy, sortBy. dialog-manage-models.tsx is the pattern.
Agents loaded via sdk.app.agents() → normalizeAgentList. Agent type: name, model, variant, prompt, temperature, etc. Read-only currently.
SessionContextUsage component already exists with ProgressCircle, metrics, tooltips — context display is 95% done.
i18n keys settings.agents.title/description already exist. ShowCustomAgents toggle exists in settings.
Agent config schema in packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts: model, variant, temperature, top_p, prompt, tools, mode, hidden, color, steps, permission.

Dirty files: install-cli.ts (new), ipc.ts (additive install-cli handler), home.tsx (session search), dialog-select-mcp.tsx (MCP health), key-hint-overlay.tsx (new), layout.tsx, index.ts, sidecar.ts, server.ts, store.ts, preload/types.ts
All agent data flows through sidecar HTTP REST API, NOT Electron IPC. No IPC channels for agents.
SessionContextTab already exists with 14 stats + breakdown bar. Overflow/pressure state MISSING — no warning colors.
Backend emits 4 compaction event types but renderer listens to zero of them. Compaction SSE gap.
Settings has keyboard nav via Kobalte Tabs (ArrowUp/Down). Models has search via useFilteredList. Shortcuts has search via fuzzysort. General and Providers have NO search.
ComposerAgentControl at packages/app/src/components/prompt-input.tsx handles agent selection in the composer.
All 3 Phase 1 features implemented. 3 new files created, 7 files modified. Typecheck passes with zero new errors.
Agent config: dialog-manage-agents.tsx (search+groups), dialog-edit-agent.tsx (form), settings-agents.tsx (settings panel). IPC handlers for custom agent CRUD.
Context display: session-context-usage.tsx updated with 80%+ yellow, 95%+ red warnings, compaction detection badge.
Settings: Agents tab added between Shortcuts and Providers in dialog-settings.tsx.
Phase 1 completion documented at docs/json/opencode/documentation/phase1-completion.v1.json. Lane frozen pending Phase 2 integration.
